title: Golden Arcane
description: An expansion of Minecraft's magic system with gold as its core material.
body:
# Golden Arcane

**Golden Arcane** is a project aiming to add its own take on "magic" in Minecraft, featuring a rather uncommon material: Gold.

Spells, artifacts, and even Soul Paths which fundamentally alter how one plays the game, and more, are all powered by this same material.

Ranging from new tools to redefine long-standing metas, foes to challenge the player's newfound abilities, and a greater goal than beating the game, Golden Arcane reshapes the standard Minecraft experience into something else entirely.

> ⚠️ **Beware! Dragons Ahead**  
> *Golden Arcane* is in very, very early stages; At its current stage, only a barebones form of the project's full potential is available to be played. Nonetheless, it is still a fully playable, if a bit incomplete experience.

## Features

* Spells, direct manifestations of magic in its rawest form.
* Artifacts, mundane objects imbued with powerful, focused magic.
* New custom effects, with unique impacts upon the user and the environment.
* Arcane Paths, a radical shift of the player's playstyle, forced by unique weaknesses and new requirements for survival. But with great struggles comes newfound strength, powerful abilities, and unexpected allies.

A comprehensive list of all features, with descriptions, usage, and obtaining, can be found [here](https://github.com/AydenTFoxx/Golden-Arcane/tree/main/assets).
